system.damage: gnarled fists and fingers d10+2 w/ disadvantage (hand, forceful, grabby)
system.specialQuality: impossible to deceive or surprise; divide damage taken equally between the three witches (round down)

selected: to enforce the old ways, the old rules

system.moves:
- Frustrate, annoy, or provoke someone
- Twist someone’s perceptions
- Vanish, be elsewhere
- Turn someone into a swamp creature

Tip: use a different voice and different physical position (left, center, right) for each witch, and shift between them as you talk, sometimes mid-sentence. When you press or entice the Willow Witch- es into changing their price or altering their deal, don’t roll. They will not be budged; the price is what it is.
